review_title: All aligned with the same purpose
description: it has allowed for more connected communication with the teams to work on the same strategy and to give ideas among all that can be beneficial
author: Julian R.
pros: Perdoo has been a very strategic system to keep all employees informed in the best way possible about the current strategies that exist so that we are all aligned with the same purpose and achieve the same goal of the strategy together. I like the design in which everything can be represented so that it is understandable
cons: without disagreements or misunderstandings, everything has flowed in the best possible way

author: Asogwa K.
pros: I have been using the software for some months, and it has been very helpful and excellence making my company's work superb and goal focused
cons: Noting, its just the best of all software so far and I recommend it to everyone as its the best of all
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good OKR software, too expensive, their required (expensive) coaching was not delivered well
description: 5 months in and we feel we are no where near getting the value after spending quite a bit up-front. So we're quite unhappy. And in addition we rarely use the software. it doesn't solve a deep need for us it turns out. What we really wanted was the coaching, which we didn't really get.
author: Deryk W.
pros: The software is functional and does what it's supposed to do. After a bunch of research we thought it was the best OKR software on the market, and it was clear from their blog and site that they knew the space quite well.
cons: The major issue is that the high cost for the software and the required coaching did not even come close to matching the value we received. Our first coach was hard to get ahold of, then left the company in the middle of working with us, then we moved to another coach, and she was great, but then was unavailable during our next round and instead we put back in touch with our sales person, but then he was out. I think they are a small well meaning company that might just be experiencing growing pains.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Promising tool for continuous development of the company
description: We are in the very early phases of starting to use it, but thus far it has been positive that they provide good quality videos that lay the foundation for the effective usage. Also, the personal support session was good.
author: Antti V.
pros: It provides a clear structure for setting a strategic agenda for a company.
cons: Minor bugs in displaying some recently input data.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Perdoo helps me communicate the strategic objectives to my team and facilitates discussions on how each member can contribute to them. For me it is an easy to use tool for aligning everyone in the same direction and measuring progress with data.
author: Joaquin C.
pros: The "forms"/"templates" in the platform help to create the right definition for each objective or Key Result, which for me is the most challenging part of the process. The check-in function is really helpful for keeping the focus during the cycle.
cons: It takes some time to customize the views based on the filters (cycle, owner, objective). Some of the metrics in the health report are not relevant for me: it would be great if I could customize it a little bit.

review_title: Great platform for OKR goal-setting framework
description: Perdoo helped me understand OKR goal setting and connect objectives, key results and initiatives.
author: Matija D.
pros: Perdoo is software that understand how to set Strategy, OKRs, KPIs and Performance review. Help you connect your vision with daily tasks in one tool. They have great ebooks and free content to learn from.
cons: Perdoo android app not as good as web app.

review_title: Great, focused tool for OKR management
description: We initially rolled out Perdoo to a small, core team, but over the last 12 months, it has become an indispensable tool in our workflow that we uses across all major teams, and it's been very helpful to successfully implement the OKR framework in our company.
author: Marcin L.
pros: I like that this app is focused on one thing (OKRs), and does it well, without the bloat of other management frameworks and processes that some other competing tool try to include. The company also keeps adding features that actually improve our OKR management process, like the new checkin functionality, explore feature, and more.
cons: Occasionally (although not frequently), it has some small technical glitches, like an update to an objective not being saved on the first attempt.

description: Perdoo feels clean, structured, and helpful.It's great for visibility and team alignment, but not the most customizable tool if you need something super complex.
author: Amira N.
pros: -You can track both your objectives and key results and your KPIs together, which many tools don't allow. -It shows very clearly what goals are off-track, on-track, or completed with nice visual dashboards. -Their basic plans are more budget-friendly compared to some bigger OKR software tools. -It's clean, simple, and easy to understand even for people new to OKRs.
cons: -The app is usable, but it’s not as smooth or full-featured as their web version. -Some users want more ability to customize how OKRs look, how progress is calculated, etc.

review_title: Perdoo, the management tool for achieving its goal.
description: Perdoo is very important to organizations serious about implementing and managing OKRs and improving their strategy execution. It offers strong customers support also user friendly.
author: Baker T.
pros: It is very effective in connecting company strategy with team and individual goals, it has facilitated clear communication and visibility of goals across the organization and it really does helps track progress and keeps individuals and teams accountable for their goals.
cons: It glitches or bugs, such as updates not saving or data being overwritten and also has limitations in customizing certain aspects like filtered views.

description: Perdoo is a helpful program to visualize and drive your company's strategy.
author: Rachid K.
pros: The regularity reports that the program provide is one of the most things I like.
cons: The Program help to focusing more by Visualizing your goals and try to achieve it on time.

description: My experience with perdoo has been magnificent and it address all our area of concern for using it.
author: Badru M.
pros: It’s ability in been instrumental in keeping our team informed and aligned with our strategic objectives. Its intuitive design enables clear representation of complex information, ensuring everyone understands and works towards common goals.
cons: Our interactions have been smooth and efficient, with all aspects working together harmoniously. Which makes me have anything i dislike about it for now

description: My experience with it was a wonderful experience. Delivers as expected.
author: Badru R.
pros: I’m thoroughly impressed as a user, I've found it to be virtually flawless. The platform's features and functionality have exceeded my expectations, and I've experienced no significant issues with it.
cons: All its features stands out, and that makes it a software I pleased with.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent tool to orchestrate strategy execution in your organisation
description: Perdoo helps us to make OKR a part of our daily routine. It facilitates everyone at New10 to define their ambitions and initiatives in a structured way that is accessible to anyone. The Perdoo staff also enthusiastically thinks along with the way that we work with OKR's and is quick to follow up on feature requests.
author: Joost B.
pros: We are strong believers in OKR to help the organisation to make ambitions measurable, prioritise initiatives and create a better understanding of the link between daily activities and the overall strategy. Perdoo is a great tool to streamline this administrative process around it. It improves structure, standards and visibility within our organisation and helps to align feature teams, Sales, Marketing, Risk etc.
cons: As a tool in development, we are sometimes unable to customise the views and overall set-up to fit our specific needs. Luckily, these feature request are recognised by the Perdoo team and picked up in their roadmap (e.g. updated explorer and roadmap)

review_title: It has a lot of features and is simple to use (⭐️⭐️⭐️ ⭐️⭐️)
author: Digdarshan K.
pros: It has a lot of features and is simple to use. All of the aspects that assist OKR tracking and implementation (progress, cooperation, communication, tracking, and so on) are extremely valuable.
cons: I like almost everything that Perdoo is providing currently.

review_title: Perdoo is simple, fast and efficient, and offers a great user experience
description: Perdoo helps teams stay focused & aligned around the annual strategy and quarterly goals. The limitation to company and group-only OKRs is very useful for companies just starting with Objective and Key Results.
author: Oana C.
pros: Perdoo enables you to fully adopt OKR framework and it's easy for everyone in the company to use and get value from. It's well designed from a visually and functionally point of view. It's very useful for remote teams for collaboration and cutting down on email. Perdoo replaces outdated processes that use slow, non-mobile Excel/Word documents.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool to align your team
author: Edgar F.
pros: - Easy to use - Tool is set up to use OKR and KPIs in the best way - Good dashboards to see development - Quick support - Easy to add new people
cons: - There is nothing that I don't like about Perdoo.

review_title: Great tool for OKRs, strategy & performance boost
author: Ivana M.
pros: A very intuitive tool for OKR implementation & strategy execution. Perdoo is perfect for boosting your team's performance & achieving goals more efficiently. Easy KPI & OKR tracking enables you to concentrate on what's most important and focus on the progress toward desired results. It's an excellent tool for increasing the engagement of the whole team.
cons: No cons at the moment, nothing we don't like so far.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - It is simple - It is not only a software but a OKR business model concept - Support is great - It is OKR 100%, compared to other softwares that are more complete, but more complex as well
cons: - Sometimes is a little buggy - Connection with asana or trello - reports could be better but not a real problem now

description: Very positive experience with Perdoo. One potential drawback for us (being in NZ) is that they don't yet have a local support hub down this way. This meant some of the calls I had with our assigned coach were in our early evening rather than business day.
author: Bruce L.
pros: Really like the simplicity of the Perdoo interface and that it sticks very closely to helping you get to grips with OKRs. It doesn't attempt to clutter its feature list with bells'n'whistles that don't really help contribute to how you might apply OKRs (compared to other potential apps in this area).
cons: That they haven't immediately implemented all of my suggestions ;). They have implemented at one at least.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Functional program that helps to align everyone with our new strategy and to learn.
author: Ruud M.
pros: The mapping structure is really functional for us.
cons: You introduce more features the last year. Given the fact that I want people to start to use the program, it helps when it looks as easy as possible

description: Aligning the Company Strategy, agreeing on Top Priorities and literally forcing the Team to think about the measurable outcomes. In addition, the team was also forced to introduce initiatives and once again this pushes the team to collaborate more and to do something with a situation
author: Pattison M.
pros: The ability to plan a company BHAG, move from binary to SMART metrics
cons: I do not have anything that I can point out

author: Ronald S.
pros: User interface, Functionality, Regular updates and documentation/blogs
cons: We have set it open to every user to be transparent, but not everybody is using it. Its more something to realize. We give regular updates en use the slack connection and thats' fine.

author: Luke M.
pros: Implementing OKRs across our business has been a really positive exercise and a fantastic way to get teams to really focus on what's important. So far, Perdoo has been an invaluable tool in ensuring that teams are true to their OKRs and these are visible to the rest of the business.
cons: The roadmap view is my favourite way of visualising how OKRs cascade down through time and across groups. It can be quite tricky to get this set-up properly so that the default view is the most complete one.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Our contact with the team behind Perdoo was great. The onboarding process was easy and fast! We definitely recommend Perdoo
author: Karl B.
pros: Perdoo is very intuitive. Next to that it's obvious that the software has been developed by people that are very well known with how te set up OKR's within a company and its teams.
cons: Nothing yet! We tried other OKR tools and none of them are as user friendly and intuitive as Perdoo
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Stacey B.
pros: I like that for me, as an inexperienced OKR-user I'm quickly able to learn how to implement these goals in my daily routine using Perdoo.
cons: I would rate Perdoo even higher if the design would be a litlle more 'clean' and simplistic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
